title: Wrap & Roll - Blue Tissue Paper - Gift Wrap, Acid Free Tissue Paper, Gift Wrapping Accessories, Birthday Accessories - 6 Vibrant Wrap Sheets - 50cm X 70cm
features: STURDY & STYLISH: Enhance your gift-wrapping with Eurowrap. This premium tissue paper is designed to give your gifts a polished and professional finish. Each pack contains 6 sheets, providing plenty of material for wrapping, crafting, and decorating projects.

PERFECT FOR SPECIAL OCCASIONS: Whether it’s a birthday, wedding, baby shower, anniversary, or festive celebration, this vibrant wrapping paper adds an elegant touch to your celebrations. Ideal for wrapping gifts, creating beautiful crafts, or decorating displays, this product is a versatile addition to your special moments.

CELEBRATE SAFETY: Crafted from acid-free materials, this gift wrapping paper helps preserve the quality of your delicate items, making it an excellent choice for wrapping fragile keepsakes. It comes conveniently packed in a polybag with included labels for easy storage and organisation, so it's ready to use whenever you need it.

MAKE GIFTING MEMORABLE: Enhance your gift presentation with wrapping tissue paper designed for strength and reliability. This durable product resists tears and wrinkles, making it ideal for a variety of uses, including stylish gift wrapping and creative craft projects. Its versatile design ensures your gifts and decorations make a polished impression.

INDUSTRY LEADERS: Wrap & Roll has become a trusted leader in gift packaging, serving retailers across the UK, Scandinavia, and Europe. Now part of the Exacompta Clairefontaine group, we deliver innovative, sustainable, and high-quality products backed by decades of expertise.
